source_pr.title: log_backup: Fix owner transfer panic
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/47533

Problem Summary:
When the ownership lost, rarely it races with the subscription tick.

### What is changed and how it works?
Now, subscription tick will lock the subscription manager. So there won't be a race.

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No need to test
  > - [ ] I checked and no code files have been changed.
  > <!-- Or your custom  "No need to test" reasons -->  

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
Fixed a bug that may make TiDB panic when PITR is enabled and it disconnected to PD.
```

symptoms: Now, subscription tick will lock the subscription manager. So there won't be a race.
failure_signature: Now, subscription tick will lock the subscription manager. So there won't be a race.
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: Now, subscription tick will lock the subscription manager.
fix_pattern: Now, subscription tick will lock the subscription manager. So there won't be a race.

evidence: evidence: Now, subscription tick will lock the subscription manager. So there won't be a race.
files: br/pkg/streamhelper/BUILD.bazel, br/pkg/streamhelper/advancer.go, br/pkg/streamhelper/advancer_daemon.go, br/pkg/streamhelper/advancer_test.go, br/pkg/streamhelper/flush_subscriber.go
